class.help: Tabla donde se registran Las clases de items.
class.label: Clase de Item
class.name: CLASE_ITEM

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_clase_item as oi_clase_item, t0.c_clase_item as c_clase_item, t0.d_clase_item as d_clase_item, SEC.policy, t0.c_clase_item as CODE, t0.d_clase_item as TEXT FROM PRE18_CLASE_ITEM as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Presupuesto.ClasesItem.CLASE_ITEM\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_clase_item LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_clase_item asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_clase_item as oi_clase_item, SEC.policy FROM PRE18_CLASE_ITEM as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Presupuesto.ClasesItem.CLASE_ITEM\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_clase_item LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_clase_item asc')/ROWS/ROW

attribute.description: Título del Curso. Puede ser un alfanumérico de hasta 100 caracteres.
attribute.label: Descripción
attribute.name: d_clase_item

attribute.description: Observaciones del Curso. Puede ser un alfanumérico de hasta 1000 caracteres
attribute.label: Observaciones
attribute.name: o_clase_item

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Presupuesto.ClasesItem.CLASE_ITEM.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Presupuesto.ClasesItem.CLASE_ITEM.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(PRE18_CLASE_ITEM.oi_clase_item) as CNT from PRE18_CLASE_ITEM Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and PRE18_CLASE_ITEM.oi_clase_item={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(PRE18_CLASE_ITEM.d_clase_item,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(PRE18_CLASE_ITEM.c_clase_item,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and [PARENT]={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW
